![ED Glycolysis-Gluconeogenesis Module](data:image/png;base64,)

*Image: Schematic of the bacterial Entner-Doudoroff glycolysis and gluconeogenesis module, separating the ED-specific upper branch from the shared lower EMP trunk and the gluconeogenic bypasses that regenerate hexose phosphates. Color coding distinguishes catabolic glycolytic flow, anabolic gluconeogenic reversal, and the committed ED branch, with the EDEMP cycle indicated as a dashed recycling connection.*
